updates.title: Income Tax Challan Correction Rules 2026: Taxpayers can now correct assessment year, major and minor head details online
updates.summary: Avoid tax credit mismatches during ITR filing with the Income Tax Challan Correction Rules 2026. Taxpayers can now correct eligible challan details online, helping ensure accurate tax records, faster return processing and smoother compliance.
